description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the openjdk:12-jdk Docker image and defines three stages: test, integrationTest, and build. Include a before_script that runs "mkdir -p /cache/.gradle", "ln -s /cache/.gradle .cache", and "export GRADLE_USER_HOME=.cache/". In the test stage add a test job that caches the .cache directory and executes "./gradlew clean check --info". In the integrationTest stage add an integrationTest job that depends on test and runs "./gradlew integrationTest". In the build stage add a build job that depends on integrationTest, runs "./gradlew shadowJar", publishes the "build/libs/" directory as an artifact, and is limited to the master branch via only refs.
